race.comment: CARRY TRADE (4) resumes. She wasn't far off maiden success before a break of five months, finishing the campaign with a minor placing over 1400m at Pakenham. Tricky draw but can roll forward and give a sight. BRADFORD (14) has been around the mark in two runs to date, switching to synthetic last time at Pakenham when fifth. The fresh run reads well and back to turf can suit. COURTING (12) is a filly by Kermadec out of Loveseat on debut who was in the placings at most recent Flemington trial for the McEvoy yard who have a strong team engaged today. She'll be ready to run well. DOLCE CAROLINA (6) resumes having showed ability in two runs last time in, she maps ideally from the low gate and should take beating. RAVENS GLOW (9) resumes off a long break but has shown some ability and can run well.
